home_primary_about_02.en: Hello! My name is Isaac Caires, and I'm a passionate software developer with over 15 years of experience in full-stack development and hospital management solutions. I specialize in creating robust and efficient applications using technologies like Delphi, C#, ASP.NET, and Python.

home_primary_about_03.en: If you're looking for a software developer to bring your ideas to life, you've come to the right place! I offer a wide range of services, including:

home_primary_about_06.en: Making your existing application run on GNU/Linux, and soon on MacOS with ARM support

home_primary_about_07.en: I am committed to delivering high-quality solutions that meet your specific needs. Whether it's building a custom application, optimizing your current systems, or ensuring cross-platform compatibility, I can help make your ideas a reality.

home_primary_about_08.en: If you'd like to know more about my skills, services, and the products I’ve developed, feel free to explore my Products page for more information.

home_primary_journey_01.en: My Journey as a Software Developer

home_primary_journey_02.en: Hello! I’m Isaac Caires, a passionate software developer with over 15 years of experience. My journey began in 2005, when I first dove into the world of programming, working on GSI, an ERP system originally developed by my father. This was where I honed my skills in Delphi, SQL Server, and report generation, forming the foundation of my career.

home_primary_journey_03.en: As I progressed, I joined Techsallus, where I expanded my knowledge of Delphi and SQL Server, particularly in the development and maintenance of hospital management systems. My work there involved optimizing stored procedures, creating jobs and functions, and troubleshooting complex database issues, which gave me valuable experience in large-scale system management.

home_primary_journey_04.en: In 2022, I moved to Softwell Solutions, where I made a significant impact on the Maker Platform. One of my proudest achievements was adapting the platform to run on GNU/Linux using Wine, making it more memory-efficient and cost-effective for clients. This was a game-changer that also allowed the platform to be accessed remotely via the web. I continued my work with a variety of tools and technologies such as Docker, PostgreSQL, Oracle, and Delphi, while always focusing on clean, maintainable code and cross-platform compatibility.

home_primary_journey_05.en: Throughout my career, I’ve been driven by a desire to learn, grow, and apply the latest technologies to solve real-world problems. I take pride in following best practices, such as SOLID principles and design patterns, and in constantly pushing the boundaries of what I can do. Today, I continue to look for new opportunities to leverage my skills and help others bring their ideas to life.
